name: Jarek Voss
learned: Jarek Voss is a rebel leader who has spent years building a network of resistance against King Malcus. He is skilled in guerrilla tactics and is passionate about bringing freedom to the oppressed citizens of the Hidden Kingdom.
currently: Jarek Voss is working to recruit Lara to his cause, believing that she is the key to overthrowing King Malcus. He is preparing for a large-scale uprising, hoping to leverage Lara’s claim to the throne to rally support.
lifestyle: Jarek Voss leads a life of constant movement, often in hiding and always on the run from the kingdom’s forces. His days are filled with meetings with his followers, planning operations, and strategizing for the future. He rarely rests, driven by his vision of a liberated kingdom.
